name: French Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dry bread soaked in the milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine meats, onions and parsley.
2. Add bread, egg, salt & pepper. Chill.
3. Form into small balls and roll in flour.
4. Brown on all sides in fry pan.
~----Sauce: 2 tbsp butter, 2 tbsp flour, 2 cups consomme, parsley, tyme
and bay leaf. Melt butter, stir in flour and then add consomme and
seasonings. Stir till thickens and add meatballs, simmer for 20 min.
